label: Obvious scam — off-platform + urgency + Venmo
text: Hey I have 2 floor seats for the show Saturday. My cousin bailed so I need to sell ASAP. Don't use the app it takes forever — message me on WhatsApp 555-123-4567 and I'll send you the tix. Venmo only, need payment in next 20 min or I'm giving them to someone else. $200 each.

label: Obvious scam — wire transfer + too good price
text: Selling 4 Taylor Swift tickets section 105. $150 each (way below face). I'm traveling so can't use StubHub. Wire transfer or Zelle only. Send payment today and I'll email PDFs within 1 hour. No holds.

label: Obvious scam — cash in person pressure
text: 2 tickets for the game tonight. Meet me in the parking lot 30 min before. Cash only $400 for both. Don't post on the site they take fees. First one to show up with cash gets them. Text me now.

label: Borderline — on-platform but Venmo and some urgency
text: Selling 1 ticket for the concert next week. Section 204. $180. I prefer Venmo — can do it through the app if you want. Would like to sell by tomorrow since I have another buyer interested. Let me know!

label: Borderline — new seller, vague details
text: I have tickets for the festival. Good seats. Message me for price. Can do PayPal or Venmo. Need to move them this week.

label: Low risk — on-platform, clear details, PayPal
text: Selling 2 tickets to Hamilton, March 22, Orchestra Row G seats 101-102. Transfer via Ticketmaster transfer. $250 each. Payment through StubHub checkout only. Happy to answer any questions about the seats.

label: Low risk — verified resale, no pressure
text: Listed 1 ticket for the basketball game Tuesday. Section 112. Price is firm at $95. You'll get the official transfer link from the platform after purchase. No rush — listing is up until sold.

label: Killer live demo — strong scam signals, judge-friendly
text: LAST 2 TICKETS for the sold-out show tonight! My friend can't go. Don't use the app — they hold your money for days. Text me at 555-987-6543 and send $300 via Venmo or Cash App in the next 10 minutes and I'll transfer them to you right away. First to pay gets them. No refunds.

label: Backup demo — medium risk, mixed signals
text: Selling 3 tickets to the comedy show this Friday. Section 205. $75 each. I can do PayPal or we can do it through the site — your choice. Would prefer to close the deal by Thursday. DM me if interested.
